title: THE ULTIMATE CREATE MODPACK
description: a create modpack that is not for the weak
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17816cbda70d7f081396d9f3f8e82e306721478a.png)
this very chaotic modpack offers a very.... *odd* experience or pure thrill and well chaos


**disclaimers**
sadly this mod is very resource intensive due to the sheer amount of mods, hell it even kills my pc to 30 fps!
and also this modpack has things like somewhat edgy humor, and guns


bare minimum/ what was used to test this modpack:
CPU: AMD Ryzen 7 5700G with Radeon Graphics
RAM: 32 GB
GPU: GEFORCE RTX 3060

another thing!
please know this is in beta and not only that this modpack needed to be remade 4 TIMES! due to pc issues, so a few thing could be rushed


**again as a warning this modpack is very very hard to run due to just the sheer amount of mods in it, and i do not know how make it run better so please just be aware that it might just be the modpack being a resource hog**


**main features include**


**CRAZY WHEATHER**
![the weather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ced6e9978e7b44ae3b06601ed7a9ff42c6bb10a3.png)

**CRAZY AUTOMATION**
![mini factory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3b1e6770ff0522aa29c4e975ee6b4a44221adb9.png)

**planes!**
![plane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fed318ac46bb9f85bd96d5b4d7358556cc2bba5_0.webp)
